blended.narrative: Crystal Mountain Michigan is looking at a significant storm over the next 48 hours, with 21 inches of snowfall of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 1,819 ft. Looking ahead, 25 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 10" of heavy snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tomorrow: 12" of heavy snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tuesday: 3.2" of snow, highs of 15°F. Expect powder.
